name: Lena Voss
description: A trauma nurse in scrubs stiff with dried work, hands rock-steady, meeting your eyes a beat too long as if daring you to ask what she's had to do.
background: Ran the emergency room's trauma bay through the worst nights the hospital ever had — and the nights after.
personality: Blunt, exhausted, and armoured in competence; she trusts skill and distrusts comfort.
secret: When the ward was overrun and there was no moving the ones who couldn't walk, she made a choice she calls mercy and never says aloud.
notes: T45 · Mercy Hospital. Skill: medical/trauma. Hook: a heavy, mature secret handled with restraint; her care is real and her guilt is buried deep.
